title: Pan-Seared Beetroot with Earthy Stir-Fry
description: A keto-friendly beetroot dish with a stir-fry twist. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Wrap the beetroot in foil and roast for 45 minutes.
2. Heat the silky oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the earthy spices and stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add the stir-fry vegetables and fry aromatics to the pan. Cook for 3-4 minutes.
4. Remove the beetroot from the oven and let it cool. Peel the beetroot and slice it into wedges.
5. Add the beetroot wedges to the pan and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
